sentence: 医生检测了他的精子活力。
pinyin: Yīshēng jiǎncè le tā de jīngzǐ huólì.
english: The doctor tested his sperm motility.

sentence: 学校教育中常常包含爱国主义内容。
pinyin: Xuéxiào jiàoyù zhōng chángcháng bāohán àiguózhǔyì nèiróng.
english: School education often includes patriotism content.

sentence: 今年的经济增长率超过了预期。
pinyin: Jīnnián de jīngjì zēngzhǎnglǜ chāoguò le yùqī.
english: This year's economic growth rate exceeded expectations.

sentence: 原子弹的破坏力远超普通炸弹。
pinyin: Yuánzǐdàn de pòhuàilì yuǎn chāo pǔtōng zhàdàn.
english: The destructive power of an atomic bomb far exceeds that of a conventional bomb.

sentence: 小路旁边摆着几块大石块。
pinyin: Xiǎolù pángbiān bǎizhe jǐ kuài dà shíkuài.
english: Several large rocks are placed along the side of the path.

sentence: 这家制药公司研发了多种新药。
pinyin: Zhè jiā zhìyào gōngsī yánfā le duō zhǒng xīn yào.
english: This pharmaceutical company has developed multiple new drugs.

sentence: 一艘驱逐舰在海峡执行巡逻任务。
pinyin: Yī sōu qūzhújiàn zài hǎixiá zhíxíng xúnluó rènwù.
english: A destroyer is carrying out patrol duties in the strait.

sentence: 这件外套的内层是柔软的羊绒。
pinyin: Zhè jiàn wàitào de nèicéng shì róuruǎn de yángróng.
english: The inner layer of this coat is soft cashmere.

sentence: 国际法禁止对囚犯使用酷刑。
pinyin: Guójìfǎ jìnzhǐ duì qiúfàn shǐyòng kùxíng.
english: International law prohibits the use of torture on prisoners.

sentence: 参谋长主持了今天的军事会议。
pinyin: Cānmóuzhǎng zhǔchí le jīntiān de jūnshì huìyì.
english: The chief of staff presided over today's military meeting.

sentence: 豆腐是用大豆制作的。
pinyin: Dòufu shì yòng dàdòu zhìzuò de.
english: Tofu is made from soybeans.

meaning: 1. to shoot dead (with a gun, or bow and arrow)
sentence: 警察射杀了那只逃出笼的老虎。
pinyin: Jǐngchá shèshā le nà zhī táochū lóng de lǎohǔ.
english: The police shot and killed the tiger that escaped from its cage.

sentence: 退休后她回到故地探望旧友。
pinyin: Tuìxiū hòu tā huídào gùdì tànwàng jiùyǒu.
english: After retiring she returned to her old haunts to visit old friends.

meaning: 1. to induce an abortion; 2. induced abortion
sentence: 医生向她解释了堕胎的相关风险。
pinyin: Yīshēng xiàng tā jiěshì le duòtāi de xiāngguān fēngxiǎn.
english: The doctor explained the relevant risks of abortion to her.

sentence: 那位传教士在村里生活了十年。
pinyin: Nà wèi chuánjiàoshì zài cūn lǐ shēnghuó le shí nián.
english: That missionary lived in the village for ten years.

sentence: 手机显示讯号很弱。
pinyin: Shǒujī xiǎnshì xùnhào hěn ruò.
english: The phone shows a very weak signal.

sentence: 他不小心触碰电线，遭到了电击。
pinyin: Tā bù xiǎoxīn chùpèng diànxiàn, zāodào le diànjī.
english: He accidentally touched the wire and received an electric shock.

meaning: 1. to coerce; 2. to compel; 3. to force
sentence: 他拒绝接受任何胁迫。
pinyin: Tā jùjué jiēshòu rènhé xiépò.
english: He refused to accept any coercion.

sentence: 听到这个消息，他感到十分愤慨。
pinyin: Tīng dào zhège xiāoxi, tā gǎndào shífēn fènkǎi.
english: Hearing the news, he felt extremely indignant.

sentence: 她周末去了一家新开的画廊看展览。
pinyin: Tā zhōumò qùle yī jiā xīn kāi de huàláng kàn zhǎnlǎn.
english: She went to a newly opened art gallery over the weekend.

sentence: 蔬菜是健康饮食的重要组成部分。
pinyin: Shūcài shì jiànkāng yǐnshí de zhòngyào zǔchéng bùfen.
english: Vegetables are an important component of a healthy diet.

sentence: 他考上了一所重点高等学校。
pinyin: Tā kǎo shàngle yī suǒ zhòngdiǎn gāoděng xuéxiào.
english: He passed the entrance exam to a key university.

meaning: 1. to baffle; 2. to confound; 3. to stump
sentence: 这道数学题把我给难倒了。
pinyin: Zhè dào shùxué tí bǎ wǒ gěi nán dǎo le.
english: This math problem completely stumped me.

sentence: 他在大学时对存在主义很感兴趣。
pinyin: Tā zài dàxué shí duì cúnzài zhǔyì hěn gǎn xìngqù.
english: He was very interested in existentialism when he was in college.

sentence: 她用平板电脑看了一部电影。
pinyin: Tā yòng píngbǎn diànnǎo kànle yī bù diànyǐng.
english: She watched a movie on her tablet.

sentence: 我们队终于进入了今年的季后赛。
pinyin: Wǒmen duì zhōngyú jìnrùle jīnnián de jìhòusài.
english: Our team finally made it into this year's playoffs.

sentence: 这个城市的年均气温约为十五度。
pinyin: Zhège chéngshì de niánjūn qìwēn yuē wéi shíwǔ dù.
english: The annual average temperature in this city is about fifteen degrees.

sentence: 演讲快结束时，他说了一段简短的结束语。
pinyin: Yǎnjiǎng kuài jiéshù shí, tā shuōle yī duàn jiǎnduǎn de jiéshùyǔ.
english: Near the end of his speech, he offered a brief set of concluding remarks.

sentence: 春节到了，合家团聚吃年夜饭。
pinyin: Chūnjié dào le, hé jiā tuánjù chī niányèfàn.
english: The Spring Festival has arrived — the whole family gathers for the New Year's Eve dinner.

sentence: 农业合作化是那个年代的重要政策。
pinyin: Nóngyè hézuòhuà shì nàge niándài de zhòngyào zhèngcè.
english: Agricultural collectivization was an important policy of that era.

meaning: to penetrate; to break into (a market, social group etc); to infiltrat
sentence: 这家品牌成功打入了欧洲市场。
pinyin: Zhè jiā pǐnpái chénggōng dǎrùle Ōuzhōu shìchǎng.
english: This brand successfully broke into the European market.

meaning: learned person; expert in a certain field; abbr. for 大方之家[da4 fang1 zh
sentence: 这篇文章写得不好，还请方家多多指正。
pinyin: Zhè piān wénzhāng xiě de bù hǎo, hái qǐng fāngjiā duōduō zhǐzhèng.
english: This article is not well written — I welcome corrections from those more knowledgeable.

sentence: 他负责管理公司的几个专案。
pinyin: Tā fùzé guǎnlǐ gōngsī de jǐ gè zhuān'àn.
english: He is responsible for managing several projects at the company.

meaning: (often used in book or chapter titles) general introduction; overview
sentence: 书的第一章是全书的总论。
pinyin: Shū de dì yī zhāng shì quán shū de zǒnglùn.
english: The first chapter of the book is the general overview of the whole work.

sentence: 开业第一天，门口排起了长长的人龙。
pinyin: Kāiyè dì yī tiān, ménkǒu páiqǐle chángcháng de rénlóng.
english: On the first day of business, a long queue of people formed outside the door.

sentence: 社区正在筹建一座新的图书馆。
pinyin: Shèqū zhèngzài chóujiàn yī zuò xīn de túshūguǎn.
english: The community is preparing to build a new library.

meaning: e-commerce (abbr. for 電子商務|电子商务[dian4 zi3 shang1 wu4]); (old) to negot
sentence: 她辞掉工作，自己开了家电商店铺。
pinyin: Tā cídiào gōngzuò, zìjǐ kāile jiā diànshāng diànpù.
english: She quit her job and opened her own e-commerce store.

sentence: 这款产品靠广告宣传迅速打开了市场。
pinyin: Zhè kuǎn chǎnpǐn kào guǎnggào xuānchuán xùnsù dǎkāile shìchǎng.
english: This product quickly opened up the market through advertising and promotion.

sentence: 贷款人需要提供收入证明才能申请。
pinyin: Dàikuǎn rén xūyào tígōng shōurù zhèngmíng cái néng shēnqǐng.
english: The lender requires proof of income before you can apply.

sentence: 英国的法律体系以习惯法为基础。
pinyin: Yīngguó de fǎlǜ tǐxì yǐ xíguànfǎ wéi jīchǔ.
english: The British legal system is based on common law.

sentence: 他的成绩在这学期有了飞跃式的进步。
pinyin: Tā de chéngjì zài zhè xuéqī yǒu le fēiyuè shì de jìnbù.
english: His grades made a leaping improvement this semester.

sentence: 他在学校参加了田径队。
pinyin: Tā zài xuéxiào cānjiā le tiánjìng duì.
english: He joined the track and field team at school.

sentence: 她走进来，大家都悄悄打量她。
pinyin: Tā zǒu jìnlái, dàjiā dōu qiāoqiāo dǎliàng tā.
english: When she walked in, everyone quietly sized her up.

sentence: 孩子拿着遥控器在玩遥控飞机。
pinyin: Hái zi ná zhe yáo kòng qì zài wán yáo kòng fēi jī.
english: The child is playing with a remote-controlled airplane using the remote.

meaning: 1. large amount; 2. staple; 3. influential family of long standing
sentence: 他们一次性订购了大宗货物。
pinyin: Tā men yī cì xìng dìng gòu le dà zōng huò wù.
english: They placed a bulk order for goods all at once.

sentence: 他真诚的道歉打动了她。
pinyin: Tā zhēnchéng de dàoqiàn dǎdòng le tā.
english: His sincere apology moved her.

meaning: 1. to provide for; 2. to keep (animals, a family etc); 3. to raise ani
sentence: 他一个人打工养活了全家人。
pinyin: Tā yī gè rén dǎgōng yǎnghuó le quán jiā rén.
english: He supports the whole family by working on his own.

meaning: 1. to enter oneself for an examination
sentence: 她今年打算报考研究生。
pinyin: Tā jīnnián dǎsuàn bàokǎo yánjiūshēng.
english: She plans to sit for the graduate school entrance exam this year.

sentence: 路边发生了事故，救护车很快赶到了。
pinyin: Lù biān fāshēngle shìgù, jiùhùchē hěn kuài gǎn dào le.
english: An accident happened on the roadside, and the ambulance arrived quickly.

sentence: 骑摩托车一定要戴头盔。
pinyin: Qí mótuōchē yīdìng yào dài tóukuī.
english: You must always wear a helmet when riding a motorcycle.
